title: RailSignals
description: Custom Train/Railway Signals for all Train/Railway mods
body:
IMPORTANT: I AM NEW TO MODDELING AND PROGRAMMING MODS AND THIS IS MY FIRST ONE! FOR NOW THIS MOD WILL ONLY BE AVAILABLE ON 1.19.2

FEEL FREE TO REPORT ANY BUGS YOU FIND!

 

 



 

 

This mod adds numerous new signals, which can be used by the player in his own modpacks in connection with various train mods.
 

Currently there is no compatibility with other mods yet, but there is a separate system to control the signals. Also, the control via Redstone is possible to connect e.g. train signals from Create to this mod.
 

On request, I will see if I can make mods compatible with mine!
 

 



 

Currently, the mod is still in development, but I can already say what features there will be:
 

German Hv-Signals
German Vr-Signals
German Ne-Signals
German Block-Signals
Signal Controller (Connect with Signals and control them remotely)
Maybe more, but currently everything is in planning
 

 

 

 

If you have Queststions or suggestions, what i should add, feel free to join my Discord Server. You will only get support there!
https://discord.gg/cFe53YqFMa
